name: {'Annabeth Chase'}
quote: {'I am never, ever, going to make things easy for you, Seaweed Brain. Get used to it.'}

name: {'Grover Underwood'}
quote: {"Percy, the gods really don't appreciate people sitting in their thrones. I mean like turn-you-into-a-pile-of-ashes don't appreciate it."}

name: {'Nico di Angelo'}
quote: {'With great power comes great need to take a nap. Wake me up later.'}

name: {'Percy Jackson'}
quote: {'The best people have the rottenest luck.'}

name: {'Coach Gleeson Hedge'}
quote: {'What about a compromise? I’ll kill them first, and if it turns out they were friendly, I’ll apologize.'}

name: {'Frank Zhang'}
quote: {'If I’m going to burn, it might as well be bright.'}

name: {'Hazel Levesque'}
quote: {'I’m not choosing one of your paths. I’m making my own.'}

name: {'Jason Grace'}
quote: {'Sorry we’re late. Is this the guy who needs killing?'}
